column1: # /File Erase Worksheet — delete a worksheet file from disk after a
# 1) Save a workbook so a real file exists.
# 2) /FEW with No on the confirm leaves it on disk.
# --- seed: write a value and save ---
# --- /FEW prompts for filename, then No on the confirm ---
# --- /FEW again, this time Yes — file should be gone ---
